command:
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai

echo '=== SYNC WITH GITEA REMOTE ==='
git fetch origin 2>&1
git log --oneline origin/main -3
echo '--- local ---'
git log --oneline -3

echo '=== MERGE STRATEGY ==='
# Remote may have commits we don't — rebase our amendment on top
git rebase origin/main 2>&1

echo '=== PUSH AFTER REBASE ==='
git push origin main 2>&1

echo '=== FINAL STATE ==='
git log --oneline -4
git tag | grep -E 'amendment|rollback|constitution'

echo DONE_1903
